code:
stateDiagram state "This is a state description of HR600 Workflow" as s2 [CloudNative_K8sCluster] --> Login Login --> if_backupData if_backupData --> StartWorkflow: false if_backupData --> is_networkAvailable : true is_networkAvailable --> BackupToNetwork: true Note right of BackupToNetwork: There is still unsaved production data in the backup directory.
Do you want to transfer the data to the network drive now? is_networkAvailable --> RemainingBackup: false Note right of RemainingBackup: There is production data in the backup directory that has not yet been backed up.
The network drive for backing up the data is not available.
The data cannot be transferred. StartWorkflow --> FinishWorkflow FinishWorkflow --> [CloudNative_Serverless] StartWorkflow --> MesDataToNetwork MesDataToNetwork --> StartWorkflow MesDataToNetwork --> Crash Note right of Crash: The transfer of the packed production data export file failed.
The data will be saved to a local backup directory.
Please make sure that the network drive is available and access is granted.
You can move the cached data to the network drive again the next time you start HRSoft2. Note right of Crash: The backup of the packed production data export file to the backup directory failed.
Please make sure that the backup directory is available and access is granted.
You may find the production data unpacked on the temporary directory TempArchiveFiles.
You can also initiate a manual export from the HRSoft2 archives.
If the problem persists, please contact Ersa service. Note right of Crash: An error occurred while generating the zip file of the production data.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just generated.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. Note left of Crash: An error occurred while generating the CSV data.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just created.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. Note left of Crash: An error occurred while querying the database for the last entry.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just generated.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. MesDataToNetwork --> FinishWorkflow [CloudNative_Serverless] Crash --> FinishWorkflow Crash --> Backup [CloudNative_K8sCluster]
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HR600工作流设计一个状态图，描述从K8s集群登录到最终归档的完整流程。核心场景是用户登录后需要判断是否需要备份数据，如果不需要就直接启动工作流，需要的话还要检查网络可用性。
明白了。所以Login之后有个分支判断if_backupData，false走向StartWorkflow。那true分支呢？是直接进入备份流程吗？
对，true分支要先检查is_networkAvailable。网络可用的话走BackupToNetwork，不可用的话要留到RemainingBackup状态。这两个状态都需要加注释说明备份目录里还有未保存的生产数据。
好的，我先把主流程画出来：Login → if_backupData → StartWorkflow → FinishWorkflow → CloudNative_Serverless。分支部分，if_backupData为true时进入is_networkAvailable判断，两个出口分别到BackupToNetwork和RemainingBackup，注释也加上了。
StartWorkflow之后还有一个关键分支MesDataToNetwork，这是MES数据传网络的节点。它可以正常回到StartWorkflow循环，也可以成功直接到FinishWorkflow，但更重要的是——它可能失败进入Crash状态。
Crash状态的出口需要仔细设计。我看到它应该能到FinishWorkflow，但还有一个到Backup的分支？另外Crash的注释内容很多，是关于各种失败场景的处理说明吗？
没错，Crash要连到FinishWorkflow和Backup两个出口。注释方面，Crash需要左右两侧都有注释：右侧放打包传输失败、备份目录失败、ZIP生成错误三种场景；左侧放CSV生成错误和数据库查询错误两种场景。每种都要告诉用户怎么手动恢复或联系服务。
已完成。Crash状态左右两侧的注释都加上了，右侧包含传输失败、备份失败、ZIP错误三种情况，左侧包含CSV错误和数据库查询错误。另外我在顶部加了一个总标题状态s2，描述这是HR600工作流的状态说明。
检查一遍：K8s集群登录，备份判断分支，网络可用性检查，MES数据传输循环，Crash的多场景错误处理，最终都收敛到FinishWorkflow再到Serverless。结构完整，注释清晰，可以定稿了。
